---
title: "UPR Health Profile"
params:
  country_name: "Default Country"
  upr_all: NULL
  rec_plot: NULL
  mmr_map_plot: NULL
output: pdf_document
date: "2025-09-30"
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# This chunk loads the necessary packages for the report
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
pacman::p_load(
  ggplot2, 
  ggtext, 
  patchwork
)
```

## Health-Related UPR Recommendations: `r params$country_name`  

This plot shows all health-related recommendations received by the selected state across all UPR cycles.
```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=5, out.width="30%"}
print(params$upr_all+theme(axis.title.x = element_text(color = "red")))
```

```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=3, out.width="30%"}
print(
  params$rec_plot+
    labs(y="Recommendations (N)")+
    theme(
      strip.background = element_blank(), 
      strip.text = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_blank()
    )
)
```

```{r, fig.width=5, out.width="50%"}
print(
  params$mmr_map_plot
)
```
